source_name: ICRC Sudan Operations and Humanitarian Response
citation_text: ICRC reports on humanitarian assistance, health facility support, displacement response, and field operations in Sudan; provides verified casualty and health system impact data.
WHO provides health system assessments, disease surveillance, and health facility operational status in Sudan.

source_name: UNHCR Sudan Refugee and Displacement Response
citation_text: UNHCR provides verified displacement figures, refugee movement data, and camp operational information.
UN OCHA Sudan provides comprehensive situation reports and humanitarian response coordination.
ACLED provides structured conflict event data including armed clashes, violence patterns and locations.

source_name: Phase 2 batch note - ICRC/ACLED heavy extraction
citation_text: This extraction batch relied primarily on ICRC and ACLED sources after ReliefWeb/WHO/UNHCR pages were inaccessible to automated fetch; diversify sources in future batches.
UN OCHA Sudan situation reports on displacement, civilian casualties, and humanitarian access.
WHO Sudan Health Cluster updates on health facility functionality, disease surveillance, and cholera.
Reuters: a senior RSF commander, Yagoub Ibrahim Mousa, was killed in fighting near Wad Madani in February 2024.
Sudan War Monitor corroborated the death of RSF commander Yagoub Ibrahim Mousa near Wad Madani.
Reuters: the RSF lost a senior Khartoum-area commander, Abdel Rahman Abu Mousa, in fighting in November 2023.
Sudanese reporting corroborated the death of RSF commander Abdel Rahman Abu Mousa.
